User_refresh: select pr_entity,pbp_brand_text,pbp_region_text,ptm_tzr, pr_process_id,pr_notes->>'feature' as feature,pr_run_id,pr_asof_date,pr_applicable_date_from,pr_applicable_date_to, pr_applicable_date_to-pr_applicable_date_from as horizondays,pr_status,timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts) as run_start_ts, extract(hour from timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts)) as start_time, timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_finish_ts) as run_finish_ts,pr_last_upd_by, extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) as duration, case when extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts))<=60 then 'Y' else 'N' end as "Cut-off met" from ymprod.rms_process_run,ymprod.property_brand_param,ymprod.prop_time where pr_entity=pbp_prop_code and pr_entity=ptm_prop_code and pr_process_id='REFRESH' and pr_notes->>'source' = 'USER' and pr_notes->>'feature' = 'REFRESH' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date' union all select pr_entity,pbp_brand_text,pbp_region_text,ptm_tzr, pr_process_id,pr_notes->>'feature' as feature,pr_run_id,pr_asof_date,pr_applicable_date_from,pr_applicable_date_to, pr_applicable_date_to-pr_applicable_date_from as horizondays,pr_status,timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts) as run_start_ts, extract(hour from timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts)) as start_time, timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_finish_ts) as run_finish_ts,pr_last_upd_by, extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) as duration, case when extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts))<=60 then 'Y' else 'N' end as "Cut-off met" from ymprod.rms_process_run,ymprod.property_brand_param,ymprod.prop_time where pr_entity=pbp_prop_code and pr_entity=ptm_prop_code and pr_process_id='REFRESH' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date' and pr_status='RUNNING' and pr_last_upd_by not in ('00000002','1200','SYSTEM');
User_implement: select pr_entity,pbp_brand_text,pbp_region_text,ptm_tzr,pr_process_id,pr_notes->>'feature' as feature,pr_run_id,pr_asof_date,pr_applicable_date_from,pr_applicable_date_to, pr_applicable_date_to-pr_applicable_date_from as horizondays,pr_status,timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts) as run_start_ts, extract(hour from timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts)) as start_time, timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_finish_ts) as run_finish_ts,pr_last_upd_by, extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) as duration, case when extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts))<=300 then 'Y' else 'N' end as "Cut-off met" from ymprod.rms_process_run,ymprod.property_brand_param,ymprod.prop_time where pr_entity=pbp_prop_code and pr_entity=ptm_prop_code and pr_process_id='IMPLEMENT' and pr_notes->>'source' = 'USER' and pr_notes->>'feature' = 'IMPLEMENT' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date' union all select pr_entity,pbp_brand_text,pbp_region_text,ptm_tzr, pr_process_id,pr_notes->>'feature' as feature,pr_run_id,pr_asof_date,pr_applicable_date_from,pr_applicable_date_to, pr_applicable_date_to-pr_applicable_date_from as horizondays,pr_status,timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts) as run_start_ts, extract(hour from timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_start_ts)) as start_time, timezone('America/New_York',pr_run_finish_ts) as run_finish_ts,pr_last_upd_by, extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) as duration, case when extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts))<=300 then 'Y' else 'N' end as "Cut-off met" from ymprod.rms_process_run,ymprod.property_brand_param,ymprod.prop_time where pr_entity=pbp_prop_code and pr_entity=ptm_prop_code and pr_process_id='IMPLEMENT' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date' and pr_status='RUNNING' and pr_last_upd_by not in ('00000002','1200','SYSTEM');
Pure_refresh: select pr_entity,pr_process_id,pr_notes->>'feature' as feature,pr_run_id,pr_asof_date,EXTRACT(MONTH FROM pr_asof_date) AS asof_month,pr_applicable_date_from,pr_applicable_date_to, pr_applicable_date_to-pr_applicable_date_from as horizondays,pr_status,pr_run_start_ts,pr_run_finish_ts,pr_last_upd_by, extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) as duration from ymprod.rms_process_run where pr_process_id='REFRESH' and pr_notes->>'source' = 'UI' and pr_notes->>'feature' = 'REFRESH' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date';
spb_adherence: with live_prop_codes as (select ppa_prop_code as prop_code from ymprod.prop_param_assign where ppa_param_id='ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value in ('Y') and ppa_active_ind='Y' and exists (select 1 from ymprod.property where pt_prop_code=ppa_prop_code) and ppa_eff_start_dt<='sel_asof_date'::date), sla_data as (select ptm_prop_code, decode(ptm_tzr,1,'APAC',2,'EMEA',3,'US/CALA') as region, 'sel_asof_date'::date as asof_date, timezone('America/New_York', ds_last_upd_ts) + (ptm_time_diff * interval '30 mins') as local_finish_ts, 'sel_asof_date'::date + interval '8 hours' as local_sla from (select ds_prop_code, ds_data_date, ds_last_upd_ts from ymprod.rms_data_status where ds_process_action='SPB' and ds_data_date='sel_asof_date'::date-1 and ds_prop_code in (select prop_code from live_prop_codes)) sub full join ymprod.prop_time on ptm_prop_code=ds_prop_code where ptm_prop_code in (select prop_code from live_prop_codes)) select asof_date, region, count(*) filter (where local_finish_ts > local_sla) as cut_off_missed, count(*) filter (where local_finish_ts <= local_sla) as cut_off_met, count(*) filter (where local_finish_ts is null) as pending from sla_data group by asof_date, region order by asof_date, region
Intra_day: select query_date, case when pr_status is null then 'Not Started' when pr_status='SUCCESS' then pr_status||' - '||cnt|| ' Run(s)' when pr_status = 'RUNNING' and pr_asof_date < 'current_date'::date -1 then 'FAILED' else pr_status end as Status, cardinality(array_agg(pt_prop_code)) as _count,array_agg(pt_prop_code) as Prop_Codes from ( select pr_asof_date,pt_prop_code,pr_status,'current_date' as query_date,COUNT(*) as cnt from ymprod.property inner join ymprod.prop_param_assign on ppa_prop_code = pt_prop_code and ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value = 'Y' and ppa_active_ind = 'Y' left join ymprod.rms_process_run a on ppa_prop_code = pr_entity and a.pr_process_id='IMPLEMENT' and a.pr_asof_date='current_date' and a.pr_last_upd_by='SYSTEM' and not exists ( select 1 from ymprod.rms_process_run b where a.pr_entity = b.pr_entity and a.pr_asof_date = b.pr_asof_date and b.pr_process_id = 'SPB' and a.pr_run_id = b.pr_run_id) where 1 = 1 group by 1,2,3 ) c group by 1,2;
User: with user_data as (select upa_prop_code ,array_agg(upa_user_id) as "User_id_agg" from ymprod.sec_user_prop_assc where (upa_user_id ,upa_prop_code,ura_last_upd_ts) in (SELECT upa_user_id ,upa_prop_code , MAX(ura_last_upd_ts) AS latest_timestamp FROM ymprod.sec_user_prop_assc supa GROUP BY upa_user_id ,upa_prop_code ) group by upa_prop_code) select upa_prop_code,"User_id_agg",pbp_prop_name,pbp_brand_code,pbp_brand_text from user_data ud left outer join ymprod.property_brand_param pbp on upa_prop_code=pbp_prop_code;
spb_batch_status: select asof_date ,status ,date_trunc('minute',last_upd_ts) as last_upd_ts,count (workflow) from (SELECT asof_date ,status ,unnest(workflows::character varying[]) as workflow,last_upd_ts from dam.wf_inventory where asof_date ='concern_date' group by status ,last_upd_ts,asof_date ,workflows ) group by asof_date ,status ,last_upd_ts;
group_weekly: WITH live_prop_codes AS (     SELECT ppa_prop_code AS prop_code     FROM ymprod.prop_param_assign     WHERE ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS'   AND ppa_param_value IN ('Y')       AND ppa_active_ind = 'Y'       AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ymprod.property WHERE pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code) ), temp_d AS (     SELECT *  FROM ymprod.rms_process_run     WHERE pr_process_id = 'GROUP_PRE_BATCH'       AND pr_entity IN (SELECT prop_code FROM live_prop_codes)   AND pr_domain = 'PROPERTY'       AND pr_asof_date BETWEEN current_date-7  AND current_date ), weekly_runs AS (    SELECT pr_entity, DATE_TRUNC('week', pr_asof_date) AS week, COUNT(*) AS run_count    FROM temp_d     GROUP BY pr_entity, DATE_TRUNC('week', pr_asof_date) ), weekly_status AS (     SELECT pr_entity, week,            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) >= 1 THEN 'Success'                ELSE 'Not Yet Triggered'           END AS status     FROM weekly_runs     GROUP BY pr_entity, week ) SELECT pr_entity, status FROM weekly_status group by pr_entity, status;
EXT_BATCH: with live_prop_codes as ( select ppa_prop_code as prop_code from ymprod.prop_param_assign where ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value in ('Y') and ppa_active_ind = 'Y' and exists (select 1 from ymprod.property where pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code) ), temp_d as (select pr_asof_date,pr_entity,pr_status,pr_run_id from ymprod.rms_process_run  where pr_process_id = 'EXT_BATCH' and pr_entity in (select prop_code from live_prop_codes) and pr_domain='PROPERTY' and pr_asof_date = 'concern_date' )select * from temp_d;
Failure_Count: select pr_asof_date,count(1) as "# of Failures/Cleanup" from ymprod.rms_process_run where  pr_process_id='SPB_CLEANUP' and pr_status ='CLEANUP'   and PR_ASOF_DATE between 'start_date' and 'end_date' group by pr_asof_date;
Failure_step: select  pr_asof_date, split_part( pr_notes->>'FAILED_STEP',' ',1) as step,count(pr_entity),array_agg(pr_entity)  from ymprod.rms_process_run where pr_process_id = 'SPB_CLEANUP' AND pr_entity in (select ppa_prop_code from ymprod.prop_param_assign where ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value = 'Y' and ppa_active_ind='Y') AND pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date' and pr_status ='CLEANUP' group by pr_asof_date, step;
overallSPBstats: WITH live_prop_codes AS ( SELECT ppa_prop_code AS prop_code FROM ymprod.prop_param_assign WHERE ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ymprod.property WHERE pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code) AND ppa_param_value = 'Y'  AND ppa_active_ind = 'Y' ) SELECT pr_asof_date,pr_status,COUNT(*) as stats,sum(pt_total_prop_cap) as total_room_count  ,array_agg(pr_entity || '|' || js_workflow_template_id || '|' || pr_run_id || '|' || pr_sys_workflow_id || '|' || pr_notes  order by js_workflow_template_id desc) as Details FROM ymprod.rms_process_run INNER JOIN ymprod.rms_job_schedule on pr_entity = js_entity left join ymprod.property on pt_prop_code = js_entity WHERE js_workflow_template_id LIKE 'DBTCH%' AND pr_process_id='SPB' AND js_entity in ( select prop_code from live_prop_codes) AND pr_asof_date in (current_date - 1,current_date,current_date+1,current_date+2) GROUP BY pr_status,pr_asof_date ORDER BY pr_status desc;
liv_prop_count: select count(1) from ymprod.prop_param_assign ppa where ppa_param_id ='ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value ='Y' and ppa_active_ind ='Y';
soft_prop_count: select count(1) from ymprod.prop_param_assign ppa where ppa_param_id ='ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value ='S' and ppa_active_ind ='Y';
softlaunchSPBstats: WITH live_prop_codes AS (     SELECT ppa_prop_code AS prop_code     FROM ymprod.prop_param_assign     WHERE ppa_param_id   = 'ELEVATE_STATUS'       AND ppa_param_value = 'S'       AND ppa_active_ind  = 'Y'       AND EXISTS (           SELECT 1           FROM ymprod.property           WHERE pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code       ) ), ranked_runs AS (     SELECT r.*,            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (                PARTITION BY r.pr_entity                ORDER BY r.pr_asof_date DESC, r.pr_run_id desc , r.pr_last_upd_ts DESC            ) AS rn     FROM ymprod.rms_process_run r     WHERE r.pr_process_id = 'SPB'       AND r.pr_entity IN (SELECT prop_code FROM live_prop_codes) ) SELECT pr_process_id,        pr_entity,        pr_asof_date,        pr_run_id,        pr_status,        pr_last_upd_ts FROM ranked_runs WHERE rn = 1;
SPB_AVG_RUN: select pr_entity,pr_process_id,pr_asof_date,pr_run_id,pr_status,extract(epoch from(pr_run_finish_ts-pr_run_start_ts)) from ymprod.rms_process_run where pr_process_id='SPB' and pr_asof_date between 'start_date' and 'end_date';
pending_prop: with live_prop_codes as ( select ppa_prop_code as prop_code from ymprod.prop_param_assign where ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS' and ppa_param_value in ('Y') and ppa_active_ind = 'Y' and exists (select 1 from ymprod.property where pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code) and ppa_eff_start_dt<='concern_date'::date ),sla_data as  ( select ptm_prop_code, decode(ptm_tzr,1,'APAC',2,'EMEA',3,'US/CALA') as timezone , 'concern_date'::date -1 as data_date , 'concern_date'::date as asof_date ,  timezone('America/New_York',NOW())+ (ptm_time_diff * interval '30 mins') as current_ts , timezone('America/New_York',ds_last_upd_ts)+ (ptm_time_diff * interval '30 mins') as local_finish_ts , 'concern_date'::date + interval '8 hours' as local_sla from (select ds_prop_code,ds_data_date,ds_last_upd_ts   from ymprod.rms_data_status   where ds_process_action = 'SPB'   and ds_data_date = 'concern_date'::date-1   and ds_prop_code in (select prop_code from live_prop_codes))   full join ymprod.prop_time on ptm_prop_code = ds_prop_code    where ptm_prop_code in (select prop_code from live_prop_codes) )select case when local_finish_ts isnull then (to_char(local_sla - current_ts, 'HH24:MI:SS'))::TEXT end TimeLeft_BeforeAdherenceMiss ,array_agg(ptm_prop_code) as pending_prop_code,timezone  from sla_data where local_finish_ts isnull  group by local_sla-current_ts ,timezone,local_finish_ts;
today_failure_job: with live_prop_codes as (select ppa_prop_code as prop_code from ymprod.prop_param_assign where ppa_param_id = 'ELEVATE_STATUS'  and exists (select 1 from ymprod.property where pt_prop_code = ppa_prop_code) and ppa_param_value = 'Y' and ppa_active_ind='Y') select split_part( pr_notes->>'FAILED_STEP',' ',1) as step,count(pr_entity),array_agg(pr_entity)  from ymprod.rms_process_run where pr_process_id like 'SPB%' AND pr_entity in ( select prop_code from live_prop_codes) AND pr_asof_date >= current_date and pr_status ='CLEANUP' group by step;
DTT_PROP: select ppa1.ppa_prop_code ,ppa1.ppa_eff_start_dt,ppa1.ppa_last_upd_by ,ppa1.ppa_last_upd_ts   from ymprod.prop_param_assign ppa1 where  ppa1.ppa_param_id ='DTT_DARKLAUNCH' and ppa1.ppa_param_value ='Y' and ppa1.ppa_active_ind ='Y';
